title: NSF Special Seminar for Early Career Faculty Members — Seminar Slides (PRISSEM)
display_label: NSF Early Career Faculty Slides (2024-02-15, PRISSEM)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2024-02-15 New Faculty Development Seminar 'NSF Special Seminar for Early Career Faculty Members', presented by Claudia Rankins, PhD (PRISSEM Academic Services, LLC). Covers NSF programs and submission strategies for early-career researchers at HBCUs and MSIs. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/5OzzS3ny4haTHHRNPzvi_qvOCE4GrlniwcHs0UiM5eP1Cg2F_XJA4Xx1lcynoGLG.-3Qx5CpD4miyTRYA
